title: calcaratolobelia aurita
intro: Calcaratolobelia aurita, also known as the auriculated lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Hawaii. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calcaratolobelia aurita include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and stress levels. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin irritations and wounds.
